taskDescription: Complete the crossword on male external genital anatomy (AN46.1-5).

words.clue: Dense fibrous capsule of the testis that sends septa inward
Network in the mediastinum testis where seminiferous tubules converge
Interstitial cells between seminiferous tubules that produce testosterone
Convoluted duct on the posterior surface of the testis for sperm storage and maturation
Fetal structure guiding testicular descent from posterior abdominal wall through the inguinal canal
Serous sac around the testis derived from peritoneum; fluid here causes hydrocele
Dilatation of pampiniform plexus veins, more common on the left side
Condition where the foreskin cannot be retracted over the glans penis
Emergency caused by twisting of the spermatic cord cutting off testicular blood supply

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the topic and try again.
